subcodes.title: Words to Corinne and Edna True, spoken on 1919-11-12
subcodes.first_line: My message to them is that they must be united, must remain firm and steadfast
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @unity; oneness of humanity
